zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis於1131年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾克里時，她的父親King Madog of Powys40歲，母親Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales36歲。她於1148年之前與Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1211年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis于1131年出生在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾克里时，她的父亲King Madog of Powys40岁，母亲Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales36岁。她于1148年之前与Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1211年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Madoc
meanings: The English form of the Welsh name Madawg.

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis was born in 1131, in Kerry, Montgomeryshire, Wales, her father, King Madog of Powys, was 40 and her mother, Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales, was 36. She married Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales before 1148. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1211, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis est née en 1131, à Kerry, Montgomeryshire, Galles, son père, King Madog of Powys, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales avant 1148. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1211, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis 1131 in Kerry, Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater King Madog of Powys 40 und ihre Mutter Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales 36. Sie hat vor 1148 Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1211 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis è nata il nel 1131 nel Kerry, Montgomeryshire, Galles, sua padre, King Madog of Powys, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales prima del 1148. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1211, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powisが1131年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアケリーで生まれた時，父King Madog of Powysは40歳，母Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Walesは36歳であった。1148年以前にRhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Walesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1211年にフランスピカーディソンメで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis(이)가 1131년 웨일스 몽고머이실르 케리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 King Madog of Powys(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1148년 이전 Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1211년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis nasceu em 1131, em Kerry, Montgomeryshire, Gales, seu pai, King Madog of Powys, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales antes 1148. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1211, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis родилась в 1131 г. в местности кирри, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени King Madog of Powys было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales перед 1148 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1211 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis nació en 1131, en Kerry, Montgomeryshire, Gales, su papá, King Madog of Powys, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales antes de 1148. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1211, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 80 años.
